name: Maropost Commerce Cloud Pick'n Pack Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure Pick'n Pack settings to optimize your warehouse operations and improve order fulfillment speed, enabling your team to process orders more efficiently with mobile picking workflows. This helps streamline fulfillment operations by customizing pick and pack filters, barcode scanning options, automatic order routing, and printer configurations to match your warehouse processes, typically improving order processing speed and reducing picking errors. Properly configured Pick'n Pack settings enable you to automate order status transitions and support both mobile and desktop barcode scanning for flexible fulfillment workflows."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up Pick'n Pack with appropriate global settings provides centralized management of warehouse operation preferences, helping ensure your fulfillment team works efficiently while maintaining accuracy in order processing and shipping label generation across all fulfillment activities."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pick'n Pack has many useful settings to help your process orders faster and more efficiently. To change your Pick'n Pack settings:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools ", "bold": true}, {"text": "> "}, {"text": "All settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Mobile Pick'n Pack", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and select "}, {"text": "Pick'n Pack Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the settings screen you'll see all the available global settings available for Pick'n Pack."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": "Options"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Auto redirect user to pack status after pick"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "On, off"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default pick filter in Pick\u2019n Pack"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", search."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show barcode instead of SKU in Pick\u2019n Pack"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The primary barcode or UPC will be displayed to users instead of the SKU in the mobile picking interface. Ideal for businesses who identify products by barcode rather than SKU."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On, off"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Auto pack order on pick completion"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When enabled orders will automatically moved to the pack status when all order lines are picked."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On, off"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Require pick bin to pick order"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If enabled users are required to set a pick bin when they pick orders."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On, off"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enable desktop barcode scanner in Pick\u2019n Pack"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If enabled the system will support scanning from a desktop barcode scanner. The suffix supported are Enter, Tab or Esc."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On, off"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use SmaPri printing for consignment labels"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Only enable this setting for SATO printers. The SmaPri integration allows you to print 6\u201d x 4\u201d consignment labels to your SATO printers. This will be enabled for all of your mobile operators on iOS or using the web interface."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On, off"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pick\u2019n Pack print label page size"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pick\u2019n Pack iOS App print label page size"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A4, letter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pick\u2019n Pack print document page size"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pick\u2019n Pack iOS App print document page size"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A4, letter"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-342e31bd"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you've made your changes, click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Related Articles"}], "data-id": "related-articles"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set up Neto Pick n Pack"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1401-set-up-pickn-pack-printers", "children": [{"text": "Set up Pick'n Pack Printers"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Neto Pick n Pack Recommended Hardware"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
